chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Virtue of Good Deeds

text: 1689 - وَ قَالَ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ: «إِنَّ اَلْبَرَكَةَ أَسْرَعُ إِلَى اَلْبَيْتِ اَلَّذِي يُمْتَارُ مِنْهُ اَلْمَعْرُوفُ مِنَ اَلشَّفْرَةِ فِي سَنَامِ اَلْبَعِيرِ أَوِ اَلسَّيْلِ إِلَى مُنْتَهَاهُ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1689 - The Prophet (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"Blessings enter a house from which good deeds flow faster than a blade pierces the hump of a camel or water from a flood reaches its destination."
